questions.question: What are the six official languages of the United Nations?
questions.answer: Arabic, Chinese, English, French, Russian, Spanish

questions.question: Who flogged his fragrance, Release Me, on the Home Shopping Channel?
What former Montgomery, Alabama resident once remarked: "My only concern was to get home after a hard day's work"?
What O-word describes oxygen with molecules that have three atoms instead of two?
What day of the year are all racehorses considered to turn one year older?
What newspaper items did Patrick Oliphant, Herbert L. Block and Jules Feiffer win Pulitzer Prizes for?
